{{Quote|Mother was right. I have got to change my social circles.|Kannen|<ref name="Revenge of the Clone Menace">''[[Tag & Bink: Revenge of the Clone Menace]]''</ref>}}
'''Kannen Doom''' was a noted [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who aged at a far slower rate than normal. In the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], she favored form-fitting hot pink outfits with low necklines, but by the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], she typically dressed in blue armor.

She was armed with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and a double-bladed [[Vibrostaff/Legends|vibrostaff]] comparable to those used by the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]], plus twin-pronged [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]] in her wrist gauntlets. She may have been a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]], as her helmet had a T-shaped visor (although the "upright" of the T was shorter than usual), and she had a long-running association with the [[Clan Fett|Fett family]].

==Biography==
[[File:Kannendiner.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Kannen on a date with [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] in [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]]]
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], she assisted [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] in getting the job as the [[Clone template/Legends|prime clone]] for the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], and she was apparently dating him ten years later, just before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], when they shared a lunch in [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

Decades afterwards, she dated Jango's son, [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba]]. Her liaison with Fett was a sore point, as he broke off the relationship without warning, and later insisted that she had mistaken him for one of the many [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]] produced from his father's template. She harbored something of a blood-feud with him as a result.

By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Kannen had fallen in with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. In this capacity, she escorted [[Manuel Both-Hanz]] to a meeting on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Tag Greenly|Tag Greenley]], and [[Bink Otauna/Legends|Bink Otauna]], intended to bring vital intelligence on the [[Death Star II/Legends|new Death Star]] to the Alliance. After her initial rendezvous was botched, she thought that she had gained some compensation by capturing Fett, although it was actually Tag inside the bounty hunter's armor. The arrival of the real Fett complicated matters, and in the ensuing firefight, Manny was killed by a shot through the chest.

She was last seen fighting Fett in a [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] docking bay, while Tag and Bink blasted their way off-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] aboard what may have been her own ship—a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] with a powerful [[Holocomm/Legends|holocomm]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Kannenblonde.jpg|thumb|right|170px|A blond Kannen in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]]]
Kannen's appearance was based on [[Drea Hoffman]], [[Kevin Rubio]]'s best friend.

The explanation for Kannen's youthful attractiveness in both "[[Fett Club (comic story)|Fett Club]]" and ''[[The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition]]'' was given in a "Creators Note" added to this page by [[Kevin Rubio]] himself: ''Kannen is Human and does age. She just ages at a slower rate.''<ref name="kevin himself">{{JCFCite|url=posts/24000077|board=Literature|thread=The Return of Tag & Bink - Revenge of the Clone Menace|user=[[Kevin Rubio|Troopsguy]]|date=2006-05-29|time=2:42 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801161920/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-return-of-tag-bink-revenge-of-the-clone-menace.22846324/page-2}}</ref> This was accompanied by a seemingly unpublished [[:File:Kannenbike.jpg|sketch]] of Kannen by artist [[Lucas Marangon]].
